title: Moderation Systems - OpenAI, Perspective, Llama Guard

questions.question: What is OpenAI's omni-moderation-latest (2024)?
options: A GPT-4o-based moderation classifier that handles text and images in one call, returning a 13-category response schema (harassment, hate, self-harm, sexual, violence, illicit, with sub-categories), free for most developers
questions.question_zh: OpenAI 的 omni-moderation-latest (2024) 是什么?
options_zh: 一个面向推理的前沿模型
一个 C2PA 水印接口
一个基于 GPT-4o 的审核分类器,可在一次调用中处理文本和图像,返回包含 13 个类别的响应 schema (harassment、hate、self-harm、sexual、violence、illicit 及子类),对大多数开发者免费

questions.question: Which of these is NOT one of OpenAI Moderation's primary top-level categories?
questions.question_zh: 下列哪一个不是 OpenAI Moderation 的主要顶层类别?

questions.question: What are the three layers of the standard 2026 moderation pattern?
options: Input moderation (pre-generation), Output moderation (post-generation), Custom moderation (domain rules)
questions.question_zh: 标准的 2026 审核三层模式是什么?
options_zh: 输入审核 (生成前)、输出审核 (生成后)、自定义审核 (业务规则)

questions.question: What is Perspective API (Google Jigsaw) primarily designed to score?
options: Toxicity (with severe-toxicity, insult, profanity, threat, identity-attack sub-dimensions) as a pre-LLM-era content-moderation baseline
questions.question_zh: Perspective API (Google Jigsaw) 主要用来打分的是什么?
options_zh: 毒性 (含 severe-toxicity、insult、profanity、threat、identity-attack 等子维度),作为 LLM 时代之前的内容审核基线

questions.question: What is one failure mode of input-only moderation?
options: It does not catch model output failures or hallucinations; encoding attacks (Lessons 12-14) can bypass input classifiers entirely
It removes the need for output classifiers
questions.question_zh: 仅做输入侧审核的一个失败模式是什么?
options_zh: 无法在 GPU 上运行
它无法捕捉模型输出端的失败或幻觉; 编码类攻击 (Lesson 12-14) 可以完全绕过输入分类器
它总是会拦截合法内容
它使输出分类器变得不必要

questions.question: What is the Azure Content Moderator deprecation and migration target?
options: Deprecated February 2024, retired March 15, 2027; migration target is Azure AI Content Safety (LLM-based, integrated with Azure OpenAI)
questions.question_zh: Azure Content Moderator 的弃用计划及迁移目标是什么?
options_zh: 2024 年 2 月弃用,2027 年 3 月 15 日下线; 迁移目标是 Azure AI Content Safety (基于 LLM,与 Azure OpenAI 集成)
